dax: SUM(FactShipmentProfitability[net_revenue_usd])
definition: Total billed revenue after rebates and credits.

dax: SUM(FactShipmentProfitability[freight_cost_usd])
definition: Carrier buy rate and main freight cost.

dax: SUM(FactShipmentProfitability[fuel_cost_usd])
definition: Fuel surcharge cost charged by carriers.

dax: SUM(FactShipmentProfitability[demurrage_cost_usd])
definition: Demurrage and detention leakage.

dax: SUM(FactShipmentProfitability[claims_cost_usd])
definition: Claims and service failure cost.

dax: SUM(FactShipmentProfitability[total_cost_usd])
definition: Total cost-to-serve for shipments.

dax: SUM(FactShipmentProfitability[gross_profit_usd])
definition: Net revenue less total shipment cost.

dax: DIVIDE([Gross Profit], [Net Revenue])
definition: Gross profit divided by net revenue.

dax: SUM(FactShipmentProfitability[shipment_count])
definition: Total shipment records weighted by shipment count.

dax: SUM(FactShipmentProfitability[teu])
definition: Twenty-foot equivalent units for ocean lanes.

dax: SUM(FactShipmentProfitability[cbm])
definition: Cubic meter volume handled.

dax: DIVIDE([Net Revenue], [Shipment Count])
definition: Net revenue per shipment.

dax: DIVIDE([Total Cost], [Shipment Count])
definition: Cost-to-serve per shipment.

dax: SUMX(FactShipmentProfitability, FactShipmentProfitability[net_revenue_usd] * FactShipmentProfitability[target_margin_pct])
definition: Target gross profit using lane/service margin targets.

dax: [Gross Profit] - [Target Gross Profit]
definition: Actual gross profit less target gross profit.

dax: DIVIDE([Target Gross Profit], [Net Revenue])
definition: Weighted target margin for selected scope.

dax: [GP Margin %] - [Target Margin %]
definition: Percentage point gap versus target margin.

dax: DIVIDE(SUM(FactShipmentProfitability[on_time_count]), [Shipment Count])
definition: On-time shipments divided by shipments.

dax: AVERAGE(FactShipmentProfitability[utilization_pct])
definition: Average equipment/consolidation utilization.

dax: CALCULATE([Shipment Count], FILTER(FactShipmentProfitability, FactShipmentProfitability[gross_profit_usd] < 0))
definition: Shipments with negative gross profit.

dax: SUMX(FILTER(FactShipmentProfitability, FactShipmentProfitability[gross_profit_usd] < 0), -FactShipmentProfitability[gross_profit_usd])
definition: Gross profit required to bring negative shipments to zero.

dax: SUM(FactCostDriverBridge[amount_usd])
definition: Driver bridge amount for margin gap explanation.

dax: CALCULATE(COUNTROWS(FactActionQueue), FILTER(FactActionQueue, FactActionQueue[status] <> "Closed"))
definition: Non-closed commercial/procurement/ops actions.

dax: SUM(FactActionQueue[risk_value_usd])
definition: Margin value at risk in the action queue.

dax: SUM(FactActionQueue[target_margin_recovery_usd])
definition: Expected recoverable margin from action queue.

VAR PriorDate = EDATE(LatestDate, -12)
VAR CurrentValue = CALCULATE([Net Revenue], FILTER(ALL(DimDate), DimDate[date] = LatestDate))
VAR PriorValue = CALCULATE([Net Revenue], FILTER(ALL(DimDate), DimDate[date] = PriorDate))
VAR ChangeValue = CurrentValue - PriorValue
VAR RateValue = DIVIDE(ChangeValue, ABS(PriorValue))
VAR ValueTextRaw = SWITCH(TRUE(), ABS(CurrentValue) >= 1000000, FORMAT(DIVIDE(CurrentValue, 1000000), "$0.0M;($0.0M);$0.0M"), ABS(CurrentValue) >= 1000, FORMAT(DIVIDE(CurrentValue, 1000), "$0.0K;($0.0K);$0.0K"), FORMAT(CurrentValue, "$#,0;($#,0);$0"))
VAR PYTextRaw = IF(ISBLANK(PriorValue), "n/a", SWITCH(TRUE(), ABS(PriorValue) >= 1000000, FORMAT(DIVIDE(PriorValue, 1000000), "$0.0M;($0.0M);$0.0M"), ABS(PriorValue) >= 1000, FORMAT(DIVIDE(PriorValue, 1000), "$0.0K;($0.0K);$0.0K"), FORMAT(PriorValue, "$#,0;($#,0);$0")))
VAR YoYTextRaw = IF(ISBLANK(CurrentValue) || ISBLANK(PriorValue), "n/a", FORMAT(RateValue, "+0.0%;-0.0%;0.0%"))
VAR ValueText = SUBSTITUTE(ValueTextRaw, "%", "%25")
VAR PYText = SUBSTITUTE(PYTextRaw, "%", "%25")
VAR YoYText = SUBSTITUTE(YoYTextRaw, "%", "%25")
VAR YoYColor = IF(ISBLANK(CurrentValue) || ISBLANK(PriorValue), "%23647569", IF(ChangeValue >= 0, "%2315803D", "%23DC2626"))
VAR StatusText = IF(ISBLANK(CurrentValue) || ISBLANK(PriorValue), "New", IF(ChangeValue >= 0, "On track", "Watch"))
VAR StatusFill = "%23F8FAFC"
VAR StatusBorder = IF(ISBLANK(CurrentValue) || ISBLANK(PriorValue), "%23CBD5E1", IF(ChangeValue >= 0, "%2315803D", "%23DC2626"))
VAR StatusColor = IF(ISBLANK(CurrentValue) || ISBLANK(PriorValue), "%23647569", IF(ChangeValue >= 0, "%2315803D", "%23DC2626"))
VAR MonthTable =
    ADDCOLUMNS(
        FILTER(ALLSELECTED(DimDate), DimDate[date] <= LatestDate),
        "__Value", CALCULATE([Net Revenue])
    )
VAR CleanTable = FILTER(MonthTable, NOT ISBLANK([__Value]))
VAR RowCount = COUNTROWS(CleanTable)
VAR MinValue = MINX(CleanTable, [__Value])
VAR MaxValue = MAXX(CleanTable, [__Value])
VAR FirstValue = MINX(TOPN(1, CleanTable, DimDate[date], ASC), [__Value])
VAR LastValue = MINX(TOPN(1, CleanTable, DimDate[date], DESC), [__Value])
VAR StartYValue = 94 - DIVIDE(FirstValue - MinValue, MaxValue - MinValue, 0.5) * 52
VAR EndYValue = 94 - DIVIDE(LastValue - MinValue, MaxValue - MinValue, 0.5) * 52
VAR TrendColor = IF(LastValue >= FirstValue, "%232563EB", "%23DC2626")
VAR BandColor = IF(LastValue >= FirstValue, "%23E0F2FE", "%23FEE2E2")
VAR LinePoints =
    CONCATENATEX(
        CleanTable,
        VAR RankValue = RANKX(CleanTable, DimDate[date], , ASC, DENSE) - 1
        VAR XValue = 176 + DIVIDE(RankValue, MAX(1, RowCount - 1), 0) * 100
        VAR YValue = 94 - DIVIDE([__Value] - MinValue, MaxValue - MinValue, 0.5) * 52
        RETURN FORMAT(XValue, "0.0") & "," & FORMAT(YValue, "0.0"),
        " ",
        DimDate[date],
        ASC
    )
VAR AreaPath =
    "M176 102 " &
    CONCATENATEX(
        CleanTable,
        VAR RankValue = RANKX(CleanTable, DimDate[date], , ASC, DENSE) - 1
        VAR XValue = 176 + DIVIDE(RankValue, MAX(1, RowCount - 1), 0) * 100
        VAR YValue = 94 - DIVIDE([__Value] - MinValue, MaxValue - MinValue, 0.5) * 52
        RETURN "L" & FORMAT(XValue, "0.0") & " " & FORMAT(YValue, "0.0"),
        " ",
        DimDate[date],
        ASC
    ) & " L276 102 Z"

VAR PriorDate = EDATE(LatestDate, -12)
VAR CurrentValue = CALCULATE([Open Actions], FILTER(ALL(DimDate), DimDate[date] = LatestDate))
VAR PriorValue = CALCULATE([Open Actions], FILTER(ALL(DimDate), DimDate[date] = PriorDate))
VAR ChangeValue = CurrentValue - PriorValue
VAR RateValue = DIVIDE(ChangeValue, ABS(PriorValue))
VAR ValueTextRaw = FORMAT(DIVIDE(CurrentValue, 1), "#,0")
VAR PYTextRaw = IF(ISBLANK(PriorValue), "n/a", FORMAT(DIVIDE(PriorValue, 1), "#,0"))
VAR YoYTextRaw = IF(ISBLANK(CurrentValue) || ISBLANK(PriorValue), "n/a", FORMAT(ChangeValue, "+#,0;-#,0;0"))
VAR ValueText = SUBSTITUTE(ValueTextRaw, "%", "%25")
VAR PYText = SUBSTITUTE(PYTextRaw, "%", "%25")
VAR YoYText = SUBSTITUTE(YoYTextRaw, "%", "%25")
VAR YoYColor = IF(ISBLANK(CurrentValue) || ISBLANK(PriorValue), "%23647569", IF(ChangeValue <= 0, "%2315803D", "%23DC2626"))
VAR StatusText = IF(ISBLANK(CurrentValue) || ISBLANK(PriorValue), "New", IF(ChangeValue <= 0, "On track", "Watch"))
VAR StatusFill = "%23F8FAFC"
VAR StatusBorder = IF(ISBLANK(CurrentValue) || ISBLANK(PriorValue), "%23CBD5E1", IF(ChangeValue <= 0, "%2315803D", "%23DC2626"))
VAR StatusColor = IF(ISBLANK(CurrentValue) || ISBLANK(PriorValue), "%23647569", IF(ChangeValue <= 0, "%2315803D", "%23DC2626"))
VAR MonthTable =
    ADDCOLUMNS(
        FILTER(ALLSELECTED(DimDate), DimDate[date] <= LatestDate),
        "__Value", CALCULATE([Open Actions])
    )
VAR CleanTable = FILTER(MonthTable, NOT ISBLANK([__Value]))
VAR RowCount = COUNTROWS(CleanTable)
VAR MinValue = MINX(CleanTable, [__Value])
VAR MaxValue = MAXX(CleanTable, [__Value])
VAR FirstValue = MINX(TOPN(1, CleanTable, DimDate[date], ASC), [__Value])
VAR LastValue = MINX(TOPN(1, CleanTable, DimDate[date], DESC), [__Value])
VAR StartYValue = 94 - DIVIDE(FirstValue - MinValue, MaxValue - MinValue, 0.5) * 52
VAR EndYValue = 94 - DIVIDE(LastValue - MinValue, MaxValue - MinValue, 0.5) * 52
VAR TrendColor = IF(LastValue <= FirstValue, "%23B45309", "%23DC2626")
VAR BandColor = IF(LastValue <= FirstValue, "%23E0F2FE", "%23FEE2E2")
VAR LinePoints =
    CONCATENATEX(
        CleanTable,
        VAR RankValue = RANKX(CleanTable, DimDate[date], , ASC, DENSE) - 1
        VAR XValue = 176 + DIVIDE(RankValue, MAX(1, RowCount - 1), 0) * 100
        VAR YValue = 94 - DIVIDE([__Value] - MinValue, MaxValue - MinValue, 0.5) * 52
        RETURN FORMAT(XValue, "0.0") & "," & FORMAT(YValue, "0.0"),
        " ",
        DimDate[date],
        ASC
    )
VAR AreaPath =
    "M176 102 " &
    CONCATENATEX(
        CleanTable,
        VAR RankValue = RANKX(CleanTable, DimDate[date], , ASC, DENSE) - 1
        VAR XValue = 176 + DIVIDE(RankValue, MAX(1, RowCount - 1), 0) * 100
        VAR YValue = 94 - DIVIDE([__Value] - MinValue, MaxValue - MinValue, 0.5) * 52
        RETURN "L" & FORMAT(XValue, "0.0") & " " & FORMAT(YValue, "0.0"),
        " ",
        DimDate[date],
        ASC
    ) & " L276 102 Z"
VAR SVG =
    "<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='296' height='142' viewBox='0 0 296 142'>" &
    "<defs><filter id='innerTableShadow' x='-4' y='-4' width='304' height='150' filterUnits='userSpaceOnUse'><feDropShadow dx='0' dy='1.4' stdDeviation='1.4' flood-color='%23000000' flood-opacity='0.10'/></filter><clipPath id='sparkClip'><rect x='172' y='35' width='108' height='70' rx='8'/></clipPath></defs>" &
    "<rect x='0' y='0' width='296' height='142' fill='%23FFFFFF'/>" &
    "<rect x='7' y='6' width='282' height='130' rx='10' fill='%23FFFFFF' filter='url(%23innerTableShadow)'/>" &
    "<rect x='9' y='8' width='278' height='126' rx='9' fill='none' stroke='%23CBD5E1' stroke-width='1' opacity='1'/>" &
    "<rect x='14' y='12' width='146' height='5' rx='2.5' fill='%23B45309' opacity='0.92'/>" &
    "<rect x='14' y='30' width='16' height='16' rx='4.5' fill='%23B45309' opacity='0.95'/>" &
    "<circle cx='22' cy='38' r='2.8' fill='%23FFFFFF' opacity='0.88'/>" &
    "<text x='38' y='44' font-family='Segoe UI' font-size='14' font-weight='700' fill='%230F172A'>Open Actions</text>" &
    "<text x='14' y='94' font-family='Segoe UI' font-size='31' font-weight='750' fill='%23B45309'>" & ValueText & "</text>" &
    "<rect x='170' y='35' width='112' height='70' rx='8' fill='%23F8FAFC' stroke='%23E2E8F0' stroke-width='1'/>" &
    "<g clip-path='url(%23sparkClip)'>" &
    "<rect x='176' y='67' width='100' height='14' rx='7' fill='" & BandColor & "'/>" &
    "<line x1='176' y1='74' x2='276' y2='74' stroke='%23CBD5E1' stroke-width='1' stroke-dasharray='4 5'/>" &
    "<path d='" & AreaPath & "' fill='%23B45309' opacity='0.16'/>" &
    "<polyline points='" & LinePoints & "' fill='none' stroke='" & TrendColor & "' stroke-width='3.4' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'/>" &
    "</g>" &
    "<circle cx='176' cy='" & FORMAT(StartYValue, "0.0") & "' r='3.7' fill='%23FFFFFF' stroke='%2394A3B8' stroke-width='1.4'/>" &
    "<circle cx='276' cy='" & FORMAT(EndYValue, "0.0") & "' r='4.5' fill='" & TrendColor & "' stroke='%23FFFFFF' stroke-width='1.8'/>" &
    "<rect x='14' y='112' width='88' height='24' rx='6' fill='%23F1F5F9'/>" &
    "<rect x='108' y='112' width='78' height='24' rx='6' fill='%23F8FAFC' stroke='%23E2E8F0' stroke-width='1'/>" &
    "<rect x='192' y='112' width='90' height='24' rx='6' fill='" & StatusFill & "' stroke='" & StatusBorder & "' stroke-width='1'/>" &
    "<circle cx='204' cy='124' r='3.5' fill='" & StatusColor & "'/>" &
    "<text x='22' y='128' font-family='Segoe UI' font-size='10.8' font-weight='700' fill='%23475569'>PY</text>" &
    "<text x='44' y='128' font-family='Segoe UI' font-size='10.8' fill='%23475569'>" & PYText & "</text>" &
    "<text x='116' y='128' font-family='Segoe UI' font-size='10.8' font-weight='700' fill='" & YoYColor & "'>" & YoYText & "</text>" &
    "<text x='214' y='128' font-family='Segoe UI' font-size='10.6' font-weight='750' fill='" & StatusColor & "'>" & StatusText & "</text>" &
    "</svg>"
RETURN IF(RowCount = 0, BLANK(), "data:image/svg+xml;utf8," & SVG)

VAR YoYColor = IF(ISBLANK(CurrentValue) || ISBLANK(PriorValue), "%23647569", IF(ChangeValue <= 0, "%2315803D", "%23DC2626"))
VAR StatusText = IF(ISBLANK(CurrentValue) || ISBLANK(PriorValue), "New", IF(ChangeValue <= 0, "On track", "Watch"))
VAR StatusFill = "%23F8FAFC"
VAR StatusBorder = IF(ISBLANK(CurrentValue) || ISBLANK(PriorValue), "%23CBD5E1", IF(ChangeValue <= 0, "%2315803D", "%23DC2626"))
VAR StatusColor = IF(ISBLANK(CurrentValue) || ISBLANK(PriorValue), "%23647569", IF(ChangeValue <= 0, "%2315803D", "%23DC2626"))
VAR MonthTable =
    ADDCOLUMNS(
        FILTER(ALLSELECTED(DimDate), DimDate[date] <= LatestDate),
        "__Value", CALCULATE([Demurrage Cost])
    )
VAR CleanTable = FILTER(MonthTable, NOT ISBLANK([__Value]))
VAR RowCount = COUNTROWS(CleanTable)
VAR MinValue = MINX(CleanTable, [__Value])
VAR MaxValue = MAXX(CleanTable, [__Value])
VAR FirstValue = MINX(TOPN(1, CleanTable, DimDate[date], ASC), [__Value])
VAR LastValue = MINX(TOPN(1, CleanTable, DimDate[date], DESC), [__Value])
VAR StartYValue = 94 - DIVIDE(FirstValue - MinValue, MaxValue - MinValue, 0.5) * 52
VAR EndYValue = 94 - DIVIDE(LastValue - MinValue, MaxValue - MinValue, 0.5) * 52
VAR TrendColor = IF(LastValue <= FirstValue, "%23B45309", "%23DC2626")
VAR BandColor = IF(LastValue <= FirstValue, "%23E0F2FE", "%23FEE2E2")
VAR LinePoints =
    CONCATENATEX(
        CleanTable,
        VAR RankValue = RANKX(CleanTable, DimDate[date], , ASC, DENSE) - 1
        VAR XValue = 176 + DIVIDE(RankValue, MAX(1, RowCount - 1), 0) * 100
        VAR YValue = 94 - DIVIDE([__Value] - MinValue, MaxValue - MinValue, 0.5) * 52
        RETURN FORMAT(XValue, "0.0") & "," & FORMAT(YValue, "0.0"),
        " ",
        DimDate[date],
        ASC
    )
VAR AreaPath =
    "M176 102 " &
    CONCATENATEX(
        CleanTable,
        VAR RankValue = RANKX(CleanTable, DimDate[date], , ASC, DENSE) - 1
        VAR XValue = 176 + DIVIDE(RankValue, MAX(1, RowCount - 1), 0) * 100
        VAR YValue = 94 - DIVIDE([__Value] - MinValue, MaxValue - MinValue, 0.5) * 52
        RETURN "L" & FORMAT(XValue, "0.0") & " " & FORMAT(YValue, "0.0"),
        " ",
        DimDate[date],
        ASC
    ) & " L276 102 Z"
VAR SVG =
    "<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='296' height='142' viewBox='0 0 296 142'>" &
    "<defs><filter id='innerTableShadow' x='-4' y='-4' width='304' height='150' filterUnits='userSpaceOnUse'><feDropShadow dx='0' dy='1.4' stdDeviation='1.4' flood-color='%23000000' flood-opacity='0.10'/></filter><clipPath id='sparkClip'><rect x='172' y='35' width='108' height='70' rx='8'/></clipPath></defs>" &
    "<rect x='0' y='0' width='296' height='142' fill='%23FFFFFF'/>" &
    "<rect x='7' y='6' width='282' height='130' rx='10' fill='%23FFFFFF' filter='url(%23innerTableShadow)'/>" &
    "<rect x='9' y='8' width='278' height='126' rx='9' fill='none' stroke='%23CBD5E1' stroke-width='1' opacity='1'/>" &
    "<rect x='14' y='12' width='146' height='5' rx='2.5' fill='%23B45309' opacity='0.92'/>" &
    "<rect x='14' y='30' width='16' height='16' rx='4.5' fill='%23B45309' opacity='0.95'/>" &
    "<circle cx='22' cy='38' r='2.8' fill='%23FFFFFF' opacity='0.88'/>" &
    "<text x='38' y='44' font-family='Segoe UI' font-size='14' font-weight='700' fill='%230F172A'>Demurrage</text>" &
    "<text x='14' y='94' font-family='Segoe UI' font-size='31' font-weight='750' fill='%23B45309'>" & ValueText & "</text>" &
    "<rect x='170' y='35' width='112' height='70' rx='8' fill='%23F8FAFC' stroke='%23E2E8F0' stroke-width='1'/>" &
    "<g clip-path='url(%23sparkClip)'>" &
    "<rect x='176' y='67' width='100' height='14' rx='7' fill='" & BandColor & "'/>" &
    "<line x1='176' y1='74' x2='276' y2='74' stroke='%23CBD5E1' stroke-width='1' stroke-dasharray='4 5'/>" &
    "<path d='" & AreaPath & "' fill='%23B45309' opacity='0.16'/>" &
    "<polyline points='" & LinePoints & "' fill='none' stroke='" & TrendColor & "' stroke-width='3.4' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'/>" &
    "</g>" &
    "<circle cx='176' cy='" & FORMAT(StartYValue, "0.0") & "' r='3.7' fill='%23FFFFFF' stroke='%2394A3B8' stroke-width='1.4'/>" &
    "<circle cx='276' cy='" & FORMAT(EndYValue, "0.0") & "' r='4.5' fill='" & TrendColor & "' stroke='%23FFFFFF' stroke-width='1.8'/>" &
    "<rect x='14' y='112' width='88' height='24' rx='6' fill='%23F1F5F9'/>" &
    "<rect x='108' y='112' width='78' height='24' rx='6' fill='%23F8FAFC' stroke='%23E2E8F0' stroke-width='1'/>" &
    "<rect x='192' y='112' width='90' height='24' rx='6' fill='" & StatusFill & "' stroke='" & StatusBorder & "' stroke-width='1'/>" &
    "<circle cx='204' cy='124' r='3.5' fill='" & StatusColor & "'/>" &
    "<text x='22' y='128' font-family='Segoe UI' font-size='10.8' font-weight='700' fill='%23475569'>PY</text>" &
    "<text x='44' y='128' font-family='Segoe UI' font-size='10.8' fill='%23475569'>" & PYText & "</text>" &
    "<text x='116' y='128' font-family='Segoe UI' font-size='10.8' font-weight='700' fill='" & YoYColor & "'>" & YoYText & "</text>" &
    "<text x='214' y='128' font-family='Segoe UI' font-size='10.6' font-weight='750' fill='" & StatusColor & "'>" & StatusText & "</text>" &
    "</svg>"
RETURN IF(RowCount = 0, BLANK(), "data:image/svg+xml;utf8," & SVG)
definition: TableEx SVG KPI card for demurrage cost.
